source_title: 02 Building Environments - The Basics/03 Creating Master Materials & Material Instances

evidences.content: 如果你来自其他 3D 软件，我想简单介绍一下主材质。 Now if you're coming from another 3D software, I want to briefly touch on master materials. 这就是我们在游戏引擎中工作的原因之一、 So this is one of those things that exists because we are working inside of a game engine, 而不是渲染引擎。因此，设置方式略有不同。所以不是每个 not a render engine. So things are set up in a slightly different way.
